RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.54/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Modified to accept more recent versions of the VS2022 compiler.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.54/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Interrupt vectors moved from a VECTORS memory section to CONST.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.54/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: MCAL files updated and bug-fixed.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.53/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Support for loading a VECU inside a user-written executable is added. See the information about vrtaInProcessAPI.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.53/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: VECUs have a new command-line option -noserver that tells them not to try to contact vrtaServer.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.53/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: MCAL files updated and bug-fixed (RTAOS-6267).

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.52/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: A SPDX SBOM document has been added.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.52/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The initialization of the virtual logger device has been updated for compiler portability.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.52/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The VS2022 variant compiles for C99 compatibility.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.52/4
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The MinGW variant has been tested with MinGW version 12.2.0

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.52/5
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: MCAL files updated and bug-fixed.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.51/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Revised ECC for MinGW compiler.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.51/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Tested on 12.2.0 MinGW compiler.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.51/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: VS variants changed to use C99 compatible options.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.51/4
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: MCAL files updated and bug-fixed.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.51/5
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: VECU run-time license checks are no longer performed for standard VECUs.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.50/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added in experimental support for CPFlex prototype

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.50/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added support for 64-bit types

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.50/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The wording in the OSS Attributions Document has been updated.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.50/4
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: A correction was made in the C# Comms library example code to avoid a possible buffer overrun

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.50/5
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Tested on later version of MinGW (12.2.0). Refined the implementation of code in WaitEvent accordingly.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.50/6
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Ensures that the CODE_FAST and VECTORS memory sections get reported in the BSWMD report.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.50/7
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Improved error reporting for invalid MemoryMappingCodeLocation values in the ARXML.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.49/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Reduce compiler warnings for Visual Studio 2022

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.48/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Target option 'Enable stack repositioning' is supported for Visual Studio 2022

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.47/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The InitializeDevices() function is declared with C++ linkage.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.47/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: VRTA MCAL DLLs added back to installation.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.47/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added support for Visual Studio 2022

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.47/4
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Removed support for some older Visual Studio versions.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.46/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Rebuilt and tested for RTA-OS 6.2.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.46/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added callbacks Os_Cbk_ChangingTrust and Os_Cbk_ChangedTrust.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.46/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Virtual Events hook code reworked to simplify TCP connections.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.46/4
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Removed support for VS2005 and VS2008.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.45/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Rebuilt and tested for RTA-OS 6.1.3

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.44/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: VRTA communications are more resilient when used on a machine using a VPN.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.43/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Rebuilt for RTA-OS 6.1.1, 64-bit option.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.42/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Floating point exceptions are disabled in MinGW builds to match the VS behavior.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.42/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Improve reliability when using break points in gdb debugger.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.41/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Updated vrtaServer.exe to support the VRTA-ux WSL target.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.41/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added vrtaServerCli.exe as an alternative CLI version of vrtaServer.exe.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.40/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Updated for full compatibility with RTA-OS 6 and below.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.39/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Tested support for Visual Studio 2019.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.38/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Improved compatibility with RTA-OS 5.6.4

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.38/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Small performance updates

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.37/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Tested support for Visual Studio 2017.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.37/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Improved multicore direct-ticked performance - especially on Windows 10

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.37/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Optimize MinGW Os_SetJmp code

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.37/4
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Ensure cross-core interrupt is unmasked by default during initialization

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.36/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Supports MCAL version 1.0.42 (Lin)

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.35/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added Os_Disable_ macros in Os_DisableInterrupts.h to support disabling of specific interrupts

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.35/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added Os_Enable_ macros in Os_DisableInterrupts.h to support enabling of specific interrupts

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.35/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added Os_DisableAllConfiguredInterrupts macro in Os_DisableInterrupts.h to support disabling all interrupts

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.35/4
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added Os_EnableAllConfiguredInterrupts macro in Os_DisableInterrupts.h to support enabling all interrupts

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.34/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Modified VS2012 compilation option to account for differences in warning messages.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.34/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Improves calculations for size reports.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.33/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Supports RTA-OS 5.6 features for enabling and disabling interrupt sources.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.33/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added option 'Instrument MinGW for Code Coverage' to support GCOV measurements.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.32/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The DirectTick action on the SystemClock has been updated to work with multi-core applications.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.31/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: A 2 second watchdog timeout is applied to the code that terminates the VECU to ensure that it does not freeze during the shutdown process.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.31/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The SystemClock device persists data across resets, to support resetting a VECU that is controlled via FMU.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.31/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Updated TrustedWithProtection support.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.31/4
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Eliminated a crash on exit for multicore applications.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.30/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Updated for RTA-OS 5.5.8.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.29/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Updated for RTA-OS 5.5.7, in particular TrustedWithProtection support.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.28/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Updated for RTA-OS 5.5.5, in particular MISRA C:2012 support.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.27/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: vrtaServer can be told to load a VECU in a specific directory.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.27/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The support tools and communication libraries have been updated to support the new vrtaServer behavior.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.26/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Fix the interrupt enabling code in the sample applications.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.25/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Tested support for Visual Studio 2013 and 2015.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.25/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Fix a regression in the RTA_TRACE support code 3.0.24 that could cause an apparent slowdown in performance.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.24/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Adjustments to support RTA-OS 5.5.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.24/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Speculative (untested) support for Visual Studio 2013 and 2015.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.23/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Adjust header file to avoid compile error related to the memset function on some versions of MinGW.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.22/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Adjust gdb.bat to suit later versions of MinGW toolchain.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.21/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Additional SystemClock action to turn off low power mode between direct ticks.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.20/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Addition of shared memory communication mechanism for local VECUs (for FMU/S-Function).

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.19/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Performance tuning for FMU/S-Function.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.18/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: VECU exits after reporting a run-time license failure. It also emits a file VECU_license_fail.txt.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.18/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: vrtaServer status dialog shows the name of failing run-time licenses.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.17/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: VECU run-time license feature supports logical operations || and \&\&

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.16/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Low power mode between direct ticks.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.16/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Freeze OS between direct ticks works again.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.15/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: New target option to specify the VECU run-time license feature name.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.14/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added NULL pointer protection for VirtualDevice::UnpackData code.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.14/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Remove double definition of VirtualDevice::SetValue (caused link-time error).

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.13/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The vrtaYield() API has been added to replace most calls to vrtaIsIdle(). vrtaIsIdle() must only be used inside Os_Cbk_Idle().

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.11/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Fixes issue with FixedInterval strategy on SystemClock where it could stop ticking.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.10/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Upissued for release with RTA-OS 5.3.0

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.10/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added preliminary MCAL generation support

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.5/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Support Visual Studio 2012

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.5/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Support MinGW 4.7.2

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.4/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Improve performance on Windows 7/64 bit

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.4/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Added poll method to trace device. (Interim solution)

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.3/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Fixes MinGW builds that do a forced OS termination - the VECU now exits cleanly.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.3/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Supports more recent MinGW versions

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.3/3
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Supports operation on Windows 7/64 bit

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.3/4
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Includes the vrta.exe command-line tool

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.3/5
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: VECU Guide updated

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.3/6
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Code aligned with VRTA-ux

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.2/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The interrupt used for cross-core communication can be selected as a target option.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.1/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Further MultiCore work. Synchronizes code with RTA-OS core.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.0/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Preliminary MultiCore version. The number of cores can be specified as a target option. Requires RTA-OS 5.0. Interrupt 32 is reserved for cross-core activation (when needed).

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 3.0.0/2
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Experimental support for Windows 7 (32 and 64 bit).

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 2.0.4/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Synchronizes with RTA-OS 4.1. No change in functionality.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 2.0.3/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Synchronizes with RTA-OS 4.01 and AUTOSAR 4.0 APIs. No change in functionality.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 2.0.2/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Synchronizes with RTA-OS 4.0. No change in functionality.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 2.0.0/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Release.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 1.99.1/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Beta Release. SC1/2/3/4 implementation complete.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 1.99.0/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Early Access Release. SC1/2/3/4 implementation essentially complete. See Known Issues.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: OS_START_SEC_SEC_VECTORS
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: The interrupt vectors were declared with a MemMap OS_START_SEC_SEC_VECTORS name rather than OS_START_SEC_VECTORS

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 1.0.0/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Release version 1

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: vrtaServer on Vista
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: vrtaServer can run as a service under Vista, but must be installed by an administrator.

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 0.9.2/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Second beta release

RELEASE-NOTE.TITLE: Modification 0.9.0/1
RELEASE-NOTE.DESCRIPTION: Initial beta release
